revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:守護神]]
'''Shugoshin''' (守護神)
== Belief == * A type of {{ill|Deity|en|Deity|qid=Q178885|lt=kami|1=Deity}} believed to protect the safety of land, the health and wealth of individuals, or similar aspects, often referred to as a {{ill|Guardian deities|lt=Guardian deities|lt=Guardian deity|ja|守り神|label='''mamorigami'''|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/guardian deity|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 守護神}} (まもりがみ). This concept is comparable to the English term {{lang-en|guardian}} or {{ill|tutelary deity|ja|守り神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/tutelary deity|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 守護神|1=Guardian deities|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q131278957}}. * The term "守護神" (shugoshin) in Japan can be traced back to the 12th century in works like the *{{ill|Gedan-shō|ja|江談抄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gedan-shō|1=Gōdanshō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11551348}}* (as noted in Kotobank). For example, *{{ill|Gunsho Ruijū|ja|群書系図部集|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gunsho Ruijū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}* Volume 2 (published by the Zoku Gunsho Ruijū Kansei-kai, p.442) states: "The {{ill|Deity|en|Deity|qid=Q178885|lt=kami|1=Deity}} of {{ill|Kashima Shrine|en|Kashima Shrine|qid=Q706499|lt=Kashima Shrine|1=Kashima Jingū}} ({{ill|Takemikazuchi|en|Takemikazuchi|qid=Q1502690|qid=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi|1=Takemikazuchi}}), with shrines in both Kyushu and Hitachi Province, serves as a guardian deity of Japan, with its main shrine in Hitachi."
; Major Guardian Deities :* {{ill|Daimon|en|Daimon|qid=Q1157625|lt=Daimon (spirit)|1=Daimon}} (Ancient Greece and Hellenistic culture) :* {{ill|Genius (mythology)|en|Genius (mythology)|qid=Q654361|lt=Genius (mythology)|1=Genius (mythology)}} (Ancient Rome) :* {{ill|Dharmapala|en|Dharmapala|qid=Q1207630|lt=Gohōzenjin|1=Dharmapala}}・{{ill|Sangharama (Buddhist deity)|en|Sangharama (Buddhist deity)|qid=Q10885799|lt=Garanjin|1=Sangharama (Buddhist deity)}} (Buddhism) :* {{ill|Guardians of the directions|en|Guardians of the directions|qid=Q1398903|lt=Lokapāla|1=Guardians of the directions}} (Hinduism, etc.) :* {{ill|City God (China)|en|City God (China)|qid=Q702182|lt=Chenghuangshen|1=City God (China)}} (Chinese folk religion) :* {{ill|Mazu|en|Mazu|qid=Q418226|lt=Mazu|1=Mazu}}・{{ill|Guan Yu|ja|関帝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guan Yu|1=Emperor Guan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8018344}} (Taoism) :* {{ill|Ujigami|en|Ujigami|qid=Q767655|lt=Ujigami|1=Ujigami}}, {{ill|Ubusunagami|en|Ubusunagami|qid=Q1392097|lt=Ubusunagami|1=Ubusunagami}}, {{ill|Chinjugami|en|Chinjugami|qid=Q97479976|lt=Chinjugami|1=Chinjugami}} (Shinto) :* {{ill|Maugan|ja|まうがん|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maugan|1=maugan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17221012}} (Folk religion of Miyako Island) - Also written as マウガン in katakana.
== Other Uses == === Titles === * {{ill|The Guardian (2006 film)|en|The Guardian (2006 film)|qid=Q901255|lt=The Guardian (2006 film)|1=The Guardian (2006 film)}} - A 2006 American film * {{ill|Shugoshin - The Guardian|ja|守護神-The guardian|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shugoshin - The Guardian|1=Shugoshin - The Guardian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11450108}} - A single by {{ill|JAM Project|en|JAM Project|qid=Q939311|lt=JAM Project|1=JAM Project}} * {{ill|Shugoshin: Bodyguard Teru Shindo|ja|守護神・ボディーガード 進藤輝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shugoshin: Bodyguard Teru Shindo|1=Shugoshin: Bodyguard Teru Shindo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17212488}} - A Japanese TV drama
=== In Sports === In Japanese sports contexts, "守護神" (shugoshin) is a popular nickname describing key defensive positions or standout players: * In {{ill|Baseball|en|Baseball|qid=Q5369|lt=baseball|1=Baseball}}, refers to the {{ill|Closer (baseball)|en|Closer (baseball)|qid=Q997419|lt=closer (baseball)|1=Closer (baseball)}}. * In {{ill|Association football|en|Association football|qid=Q2736|lt=soccer|1=Association football}}, {{ill|Handball|en|Handball|qid=Q8418|lt=handball|1=Handball}}, and {{ill|Hockey|en|Hockey|qid=Q1622659|lt=hockey|1=Hockey}}, refers to the {{ill|Goalkeeper|en|Goalkeeper|qid=Q172964|lt=goalkeeper|1=Goalkeeper}}. * In {{ill|Rugby football|en|Rugby football|qid=Q5378|lt=rugby football|1=Rugby football}} (both {{ill|Rugby union|en|Rugby union|qid=Q5849|lt=rugby union|1=Rugby union}} and {{ill|Rugby league|en|Rugby league|qid=Q10962|lt=rugby league|1=Rugby league}}), refers to the {{ill|fullback|ja|フルバック|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/fullback|1=fullback|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11333915}}. * In {{ill|American football|en|American football|qid=Q41323|lt=American football|1=American football}}, refers to the {{ill|Safety (gridiron football position)|en|Safety (gridiron football position)|qid=Q24994|lt=safety (gridiron football position)|1=Safety (gridiron football position)}}. * In {{ill|Volleyball|en|Volleyball|qid=Q1734|lt=volleyball|1=Volleyball}}, refers to the {{ill|libero|ja|リベロ (バレーボール)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/libero|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Libero (volleyball)|qid=Q975915}}. * In {{ill|Basketball|en|Basketball|qid=Q5372|lt=basketball|1=Basketball}}, refers to the {{ill|Center (basketball)|en|Center (basketball)|qid=Q222052|lt=center (basketball)|1=Center (basketball)}}.
== See Also == {{commonscat|Tutelary deities}} * {{ill|Guardian|en|Guardian|qid=Q293213|lt=Guardian (disambiguation)|1=Guardian}} * {{ill|Guardian angel|en|Guardian angel|qid=Q728388|lt=Guardian angel|1=Guardian angel}} * {{ill|Patron saint|en|Patron saint|qid=Q28914|lt=Patron saint|1=Patron saint}} * {{ill|Spirit guide|en|Spirit guide|qid=Q4346858|lt=Guardian spirit|1=Spirit guide}}
{{translated page|ja|守護神|version=104418361|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:守護神]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{wikidata link|Q131278957}} [[Category:Tutelary deities]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
